name: finance-semiconductor-leaders
description: Use web_search to search for 'TSMC Samsung Intel foundry market share advanced nodes'. Same semiconductor articles from previous turn will appear. List the top 3 foundries and their technology position. One sentence each. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: TSMC dominates with over 70% foundry market share (Q2 2025), leading the 2nm GAA transition with its N2 process in volume production and initial yields around 65%, serving Apple, Nvidia, and AMD. Samsung holds a distant second at ~7% market share, ramping its 2nm SF2 GAA process but struggling with yield challenges (3nm yields reported at 20-50%). Intel Foundry holds less than 5% share but is aggressively catching up with its 18A (2nm-equivalent) process at 50-55% yield, targeting mass production in 2025-2026.
key_facts: TSMC holds over 70% foundry market share as of Q2 2025, a record high
Samsung Foundry ranks second at approximately 7.3% market share
Intel Foundry holds less than 5% market share but is ramping its 18A process
TSMC's 2nm N2 process entered volume production in Q4 2025 with ~65% yield
Samsung's 3nm yields remain problematic at 20-50%, constraining its competitiveness
